nodes.text:
Symptoms include abdominal discomfort, anaemia symptoms, reduced appetite and abdominal bloating for 12 weeks. Additional symptoms include nocturnal symptoms.

Imaging:
CT TAP on 29/04/2024: transverse colon mass with few mildly enlarged mesenteric nodes; no liver mets. CT T3 N1 M0
